name: Dark Contract with the Zero King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>零</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "D/D" card.)
You can target 1 "D/D" card you control, except "Dark Contract with the Zero King"; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "D/D" monster from your Deck, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except "D/D" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Dark Contract with the Zero King" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.

You can only use this effect of "Dark Contract with the Zero King" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.

mentions: Dark Contract with the Zero King
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
